evidence.snippet: before: "(hash f03ebdce)" → after: "GPT-5.6 Soul flagship chat for advanced reasoning, production work, code, and structured responses at GPT-5.5-matched pricing. Pay up to $0.455 per request with x402 USDC on Base or choose the fixed-price Solana USDC option when advertised. Exact fixed-price payment and Base upto token-metered payme"

findings.remediation: Re-review the tool before continuing to trust it.
